item.title: Ukrainian Olympian Is Disqualified Over Helmet Honoring War Dead
item.description: Olympic officials ruled that Vladyslav Heraskevych’s helmet violated a prohibition on political speech, setting off outrage at the Winter Games in Ita...

item.title: Leqaa Kordia, Columbia Protester in ICE Custody for Nearly a Year, Suffers Seizure
item.description: Leqaa Kordia, 33, of New Jersey, was hospitalized after hitting her head at a Texas detention center, her lawyer said. She was initially arrested duri...
